content.en:
"The immortal power has increased a lot, it has reached the limit, and even the immortal body and immortal soul have also increased a lot, so my overall strength has also improved a lot, but I am still a little short of the son of the era!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

That's right, it's just a little bit.

Ye Tian could feel a kind of shackles in the underworld, and as long as he broke this shackle, he could ascend to the combat power of the son of the era and become the first son of the era in this universe.

But this bottleneck is not easy to break, because Ye Tian can improve relatively few aspects at present, and it takes a long time to improve, which cannot be completed overnight.

For example, if Ye Tian can become a fourth-order life, he may be able to break the shackles, but at present, it is not easy to become a fourth-order life, it is a very difficult thing.

The reason why Ye Tian was able to cultivate the Tianyuan True Law to the third layer at once was because he was a third-order life being, so he cultivated to the third layer without any bottleneck.

But it was not easy to cultivate to the fourth level of the Tianyuan True Method, and it was not easy to cultivate in a special environment.

The Immortal Unification Technique requires the help of Necromantic Qi to cultivate, and although the cultivation difficulty of the fourth layer of the Heavenly Yuan True Method is weaker than that of the Immortal Unification Technique, it is still very difficult.

Ye Tian needed to find a place with a thousand heavy waters, and then find a place with a thousand heavy waters, contact the power of water in two places, baptize the whole body, and impact the fourth layer realm of the Tianyuan True Law.

However, isn't it the horror of a thousand weak waters and a thousand heavy waters, even if you find it, if you want to enter a thousand weak waters and a thousand heavy waters, you are basically looking for death.

Weak water is terrifyingly corrosive, while heavy water has strong pressure.

With Ye Tian's strength, it is difficult to resist a thousand weak waters and a thousand heavy waters, unless special methods are used.

"Lord of Darkness!"

Ye Tian called out.

The next moment, the Dark Lord appeared in front of Ye Tian.

"Your Highness, what do you command?"

The Dark Lord asked.

"Lord of Darkness, I want to know where there are a thousand weak waters and a thousand heavy waters, and with my current strength, how can I resist a thousand weak waters and a thousand heavy waters?"

Ye Tian asked seriously.

The Dark Lord glanced at Ye Tian's serious expression, and suddenly asked, so he guessed that Ye Tian must be cultivating some kind of secret technique, and he needed to use a thousand heavy water and a thousand weak water.

It is necessary to use a thousand heavy water and a thousand weak water secret techniques, which are definitely earth-shattering secret techniques, how can ordinary people be qualified to cultivate.

However, when he thought of Ye Tian's situation and the degree of demonism, it was not too strange.

"Your Highness, I know some places where the thousand heavy weak water and the thousand heavy water are located, but His Highness estimates that a thousand heavy weak water and a thousand heavy water will be needed in a short time, if they are too far apart, it is really inconvenient, but there is a place that has a thousand heavy water and a thousand weak water at the same time, which is extremely suitable for the cultivation place that His Highness needs. This place is the Blue Water Realm under the command of the Divine Blade Alliance, and there are various water system cultivation environments in the Blue Water Realm, including the Land of Thousands of Weak Waters and the Land of Thousands of Heavy Waters. As for how to make His Highness bear the power of a thousand weak waters and a thousand heavy waters, it is estimated that it is a little difficult. “

As he spoke, the Dark Lord frowned, as if in deep thought.

"There is still a way to explain the difficulty, and please tell the Lord of Darkness about it. "

Ye Tian hurriedly said.

After pondering for a moment, the Lord of Darkness spoke: "I know that there are several ways, but there are only two ways suitable for Your Highness, the first way is to find the essence of the water for millions of years, and use the essence of the water to protect your body, so that you can withstand the power of thousands of heavy waters and thousands of weak waters, but the essence of millions of years of water is extremely rare, and even I don't know where it will be." The second way is to use the Immortal Golden Pill to protect one's body, so that he can withstand the power of a thousand weak waters and a thousand heavy waters. "

"Immortal Golden Pill, where is it?"

Ye Tian asked curiously.

"Danta, one of the nine supreme-level forces!"

The Darkness Dominates.

"Danta!" Ye Tian knew that this supreme-level force was relatively low-key among the nine supreme-level forces, and its strength was slightly weaker, but Danta's role in the supreme-level force was very large.

The Danta is divided into two parts of power, one part is the fighting power and the other part is the alchemy power.

The combat force protects the Danta, and the alchemy force mainly refines the pill and transports the human race.

The pill is a relatively conventional resource, and many martial artists need the pill for cultivation, but for His Royal Highness like Ye Tian, it is not beneficial to use the pill to improve cultivation, only the power that he cultivates step by step is more refined.

However, for most of the warriors of the human race, the benefits of the pill were too great, so many people were eager to use the pill to improve their cultivation.

There are pills for Danta, pills to improve cultivation, pills to restore injuries, pills to temporarily increase strength, and even talent pills to increase talents, pills to increase talent levels, and various pills that are rarely useful.

The high-grade elixirs of the human race are basically only available in Danta.

Under the narration of the Dark Lord, Ye Tian knew the usefulness of the Immortal Golden Pill.

The Immortal Golden Pill is a life-saving elixir that can coat the body with a layer of gold in a short period of time, which can increase defense and defend against the invasion and attack of many forces.

Of course, this elixir is extremely precious, and even some galaxy-level powerhouses are reluctant to use it.

"Lord of Darkness, if I buy the Immortal Golden Pill from Danta, will I be able to buy it?"

Ye Tian asked.

"It's a bit difficult!" said the Dark Lord, "It's not a matter of price, it's a matter of scarcity, the materials of the Immortal Golden Pill are somewhat rare, and it is impossible to refine too many Immortal Golden Pills every time, and there are too many people who ask for the Immortal Golden Pill, because the Immortal Golden Pill is one of the best treasures for some weak gods to save their lives, and everyone wants to get it." I don't know if Danta is willing to sell a few pills to His Majesty, but I can ask a few of Danta's old friends. "

"Thank you for the Dark Master!"

Ye Tian thanked.

"Your Highness is polite, as your bodyguard, I should be like this. "

Immediately, the Lord of Darkness departed.

Ye Tian quietly waited for news of the Dark Lord, and three days later, the Dark Lord came.

"Your Highness, I asked a few of my old friends, Danta's current Immortal Golden Pill is almost exhausted, and the remaining Immortal Golden Pill has been booked, and those old friends are not good at cutting off other people's Immortal Golden Pills. "

The Dark Lord said helplessly.

"Is that hopeless?"

Ye Tian was a little disappointed, he thought there was a drama, but he didn't expect it to work.

"No!" the Dark Lord said again: "There is another way, not long after, Danta will have to refine a batch of Immortal Golden Pills again, but it is very troublesome and difficult to collect the materials of the Immortal Golden Pill, if His Highness helps, Danta is willing to give His Highness some Immortal Golden Pills with His Highness's contribution." "

"What exactly?"

Ye Tiandao.

The Dark Lord explained the specific situation, and Ye Tian quickly understood.

It turned out that among the materials needed for the Immortal Golden Pill, there were two materials that were extremely rare and scarce, and only a few places had them, and the safest place among them still belonged to the Stygian Flower Realm.

The Stygian Flower Realm is a place that only god-level people can enter, but the key problem is that there are true god-level creatures within the Stygian Flower Realm.

Such a world that is not friendly to outside creatures has the indispensable red sandalwood and golden bone leaves of the Immortal Golden Pill, and without the Purple Sandalwood and the Golden Bone Leaves, the Immortal Golden Pill cannot be refined at all.

But it is very dangerous for the god level to enter the Stygian Flower Realm, and if you are not careful, you will die.

Every time in order to collect red sandalwood flowers and golden bone leaves, Danta would lose a large number of god levels, although it was heartbroken, but he had to collect it, because the immortal golden pill was too important.

In order to make up for the loss, every time he collected red sandalwood and golden bone leaves, Danta would also summon a group of gods from the outside world to collect red sandalwood and golden bone leaves for them.

Although the gods of the outside world also knew the danger of collecting red sandalwood flowers and golden bone leaves, the reward given by Danta was too precious, and many people were still extremely excited, so they entered the Stygian Flower Realm one by one.

Only in this way was Danta's losses minimized, but still severe.

"Danta wants me to go to the Stygian Flower Realm!"

Ye Tian understood Danta's plan, obviously valued his strength, with his strength, if he entered the Stygian Flower Realm, he would definitely be able to help Danta obtain a large number of red sandalwood flowers and golden bone leaves, and all he paid was some immortal golden pills.

Such a deal is too cost-effective to benefit Danta Bai.

Ye Tian also knew that this was a loss-making business, but he really needed the Immortal Golden Pill, so he had to agree.

"Lord of Darkness, tell Danta that I am willing to go to the Stygian Flower Realm, when will I go?"

Ye Tian asked.

"About three months away!" said the Dark Lord.

Immediately, the Dark Lord went to inform Danta, and Danta also gave a specific time, entering the Stygian Flower Realm in five months, and Ye Tian needed to go to Danta in four months.

In the blink of an eye, four months have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian entered the Saint Dan River system where the Dan Tower was located under the escort of the Dark Lord.

The architectural style of Dan Tower is one tower after another, and some of the huge towers are even comparable to a planet, which makes Ye Tian extremely amazed.

After entering the Dan Tower, Ye Tian was arranged to live in one of the Dan Towers.

-----------

Danta, one of the Danta.

A woman in white listens to a galactic servant.

"Third Miss, the Lord has promised to let you enter the Stygian Flower Realm. "

The servant said.

"Why did my father suddenly agree?" the woman in white was curious.

She is the daughter of one of the masters of the Danta, named Lu Qinghan, known as the Qinghan Fairy, her identity is extremely noble, and now although she is only a god-level ninth-order cultivator, her strength is considered to be the top among the Danta.

It's just that because of her noble status, Danta is not worried that she will enter some dangerous places, and the Stygian Flower Realm is very dangerous, once there is danger, even the master will not be able to enter the rescue.

Therefore, the Qinghan Fairy thought that her father should refuse her request.

But she never expected that this time, her father would agree, which was really unexpected by her!

"It seems that Danta invited a very powerful god-level!"

The galactic servant said.
